channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INTLCONV*] International Conveyors Ltd Closes Trading Window Till 48 Hours After Q4 & FY26 Results
item.description:
International Conveyors Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the securities of the company in any manner. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct. The trading window will remain closed for all Directors, KMP, and other designated persons from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter & year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration and approval of the audited financial results will be communicated later.

  • Trading window of International Conveyors Ltd closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after Q4 & FY26 results
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct
  • Applies to all Directors, KMP, and other designated persons
  • Date of Board Meeting for approval of audited financial results to be communicated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTERNATIONAL CONVEYORS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NACDAC] NACDAC Infrastructure Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
NACDAC Infrastructure Ltd, in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is effective from April 01st, 2026 until 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting where the Audited Financial Results for the half year and Financial Year ending on March 31st, 2026 will be considered. The decision is made to ensure regulatory compliance and transparency in trading activities.

  • NACDAC Infrastructure Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • Closure effective from April 01st, 2026 until 48 hours after the Board Meeting considering the Audited Financial Results for the period ending on March 31st, 2026.
  • Move aligns with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • Trading window closure aims to ensure regulatory compliance and transparency.
  • Designated persons, connected persons, and their immediate relatives are directed not to trade in the company's securities during the closure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NACDAC Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SWANENERGY] Swan Corp Ltd Issues Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 72.57 Crores for Subsidiary Swan LNG Private Limited
item.description:
Swan Corp Ltd, a company registered under CIN: L177100MH1909PLC0O00294, has issued a corporate guarantee for an amount of Rs. 72.57 crores (Rupees Seventy Two Crores and Fifty Seven lakhs) for securing repayment obligation of its subsidiary, Swan LNG Private Limited (SLPL). This issuance of the corporate guarantee does not have any immediate pecuniary impact on Swan Corp Limited. The decision to provide the guarantee was made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations read with Para B of Part A of Schedule ll, and the details of the transaction are provided in Annexure A.

  • Swan Corp Ltd issues corporate guarantee for Rs. 72.57 crores for Swan LNG Private Limited.
  • The guarantee does not have any immediate pecuniary impact on Swan Corp Limited.
  • The decision is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • Swan LNG Private Limited is a subsidiary of Swan Corp Ltd.
  • The transaction details are provided in Annexure A.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SWAN ENERGY LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [MADHAV] Madhav Marbles & Granites Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Madhav Marbles & Granites Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Prohibition of Insider Trading Policy. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and period ended March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting for the financial results declaration will be informed separately.

  • Madhav Marbles & Granites Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of Q1 2026 financial results
  • Action taken in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Company's Prohibition of Insider Trading Policy also applicable
  • Date of board meeting for financial results declaration to be informed separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MADHAV MARBLES & GRANITES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GODREJCP] Godrej Consumer Products Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Insider Trading
item.description:
Godrej Consumer Products Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ending March 31, 2026. This decision is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and relevant SEBI circulars. All Designated Persons of the company have been informed not to trade in Equity Shares of the Company during the stated period.

  • Trading window for Godrej Consumer Products Ltd to be closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Decision is in compliance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and relevant SEBI circulars.
  • All Designated Persons of the company have been informed not to trade in Equity Shares of the Company during the stated period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GODREJ CONSUMER PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PINELABS] RBI Imposes Penalty on Pine Labs Ltd for KYC Violations
item.description:
Pine Labs Ltd has been issued a penalty by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) under Section 30(1) read with Section 26(6) of the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007. The penalty is imposed due to the issuance of certain Full-KYC Prepaid Payment Instruments (PPIs) without completing the Know Your Customer (KYC) verification of the respective PPI holders. The company has stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities due to this order.

  • Pine Labs Ltd fined by RBI
  • Penalty imposed under Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007
  • Violation of KYC norms in issuing Full-KYC PPIs
  • No material impact on the company's financials, operations, or other activities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pine Labs Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [SUDTIND-B] Suditi Industries Ltd Completes 50% Acquisition of SAA & Suditi Retail
item.description:
Suditi Industries Ltd has successfully completed the acquisition of 50% equity shareholding in SAA & Suditi Retail Private Limited, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary. The acquisition was done at an arm’s length basis through the acquisition of Equity Shares from Project Anushka Sharma Lifestyles Private Limited. The cost of acquisition was Rs. 5,000/-. SAA & Suditi Retail is engaged in the manufacturing of all types of textile garments and clothing accessories, with a history of increasing turnover over the last 3 years.

  • Suditi Industries Ltd acquires 50% equity shareholding in SAA & Suditi Retail
  • Acquisition makes SAA & Suditi Retail a wholly-owned subsidiary of Suditi Industries Ltd
  • Transaction done at arm’s length basis
  • Acquisition cost was Rs. 5,000/-
  • SAA & Suditi Retail's turnover has been increasing over the last 3 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUDITI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [CHOICEIN] Choice International Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window from April 01, 2026
item.description:
Choice International Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring, Preventing and Reporting of Trading in securities by the Designated Persons and their immediate relatives under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 as amended. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the audited Financial Results for Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026, will be intimated separately. All Designated Persons covered under the Code have been advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during the aforesaid period of closure of Trading Window.

  • Closure of trading window from April 01, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed till 48 hours after the declaration of audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026
  • Decision in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 as amended
  • Date of Board Meeting to consider the audited Financial Results for Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026 will be intimated separately
  • Designated Persons advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during the closure of Trading Window

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHOICE INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JINDALSTEL] Jindal Steel Ltd Announces Appointment of Debojyoti Roy as Additional Director and Wholetime Director, and Re-appointment of Damodar Mittal as Wholetime Director
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jindal Steel Ltd has informed about the appointment of Debojyoti Roy as Additional Director and Wholetime Director, and the re-appointment of Damodar Mittal as Wholetime Director. Roy has approximately 27 years of work experience and was previously associated with Tata Steel Ltd. Mittal, who has 37 years of work experience, started his career with Jindal Steel in 1989 and manages Iron Zone operations at Angul. The appointments are subject to the approval of the Shareholders.

  • Debojyoti Roy appointed as Additional Director and Wholetime Director of Jindal Steel Ltd
  • Damodar Mittal re-appointed as Wholetime Director of Jindal Steel Ltd
  • Roy has 27 years of work experience, Mittal has 37 years
  • Roy was previously associated with Tata Steel Ltd, Mittal started his career with Jindal Steel in 1989
  • Appointments subject to the approval of the Shareholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STEEL & POWER LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BORANA] Borana Weaves Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Insider Trading Prevention
item.description:
Borana Weaves Limited has informed the exchange about the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and is aimed at preventing insider trading during the declaration of the audited Financial Results for the quarter and Financial Year ending March 31, 2026. The trading window will be closed for all Directors, KMPs, Designated Persons (Including their immediate relatives) and Insiders from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the date of declaration of the audited Financial Results. The date of the Board Meeting on which the results will be considered will be intimated in due course of time.

  • Borana Weaves Limited has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company.
  • The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The trading window will be closed for all Directors, KMPs, Designated Persons (Including their immediate relatives) and Insiders from April 1, 2026.
  • The closure is to prevent insider trading during the declaration of the audited Financial Results for the quarter and Financial Year ending March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting on which the results will be considered will be intimated in due course of time.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Borana Weaves Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
